read_system.title: Read the Eye scroll (found in desert temples and ruins) — understand the portal system

stronghold.title: Locate a Stronghold using Eyes of Ender and find the End Portal room

subtitle.text: Twelve eyes. Twelve civilizations. Twelve confirmations that you were there.

description: End Remastered replaces all 12 vanilla Eyes of Ender
with 12 unique custom eyes — each one the inheritance of a civilization.
A key fits a lock. The relationship is mechanical.
Each one says: you have been where this required.
You have done what this costs.
Twelve confirmations. Then the gate believes you.
The portal frame is in the Stronghold.
The frame slots accept any valid eye.
You need 12 unique ones. The hunt begins now.
→ Read the Eye scroll (found in desert temples, ruins) [check]
→ Locate the Stronghold and End Portal room [check]
→ Craft 4 vanilla Eyes of Ender for scouting
